underlying_goal: Iteratively improve an Android weather app's UI, settings, widget reactivity, CI/CD pipeline, release signing, and build optimization
friction_detail: Missing strings in strings.xml weren't saved to disk, caught by a compile check hook.
brief_summary: User iteratively refined their Android weather app's UI, widget behavior, CI/CD pipeline, release signing, and APK optimization across a long session, with nearly all requests fulfilled successfully.
